case_synopsis: Jordan Example alleges retaliation after reporting discrimination to HR, with rapid temporal proximity and documentary support.

documents.content: The termination email followed within two days of the HR complaint.
documents.title: Termination email

testimony.content: I reported discrimination to HR before my supervisor threatened to fire me.
testimony.title: Jordan declaration

intake_answers.adverse_action: Was sidelined, threatened with termination, and then terminated
intake_answers.harm: Lost wages, benefits, professional standing, and suffered emotional distress
intake_answers.protected_activity: Reported discrimination to HR and requested corrective action
intake_answers.timeline: Reported discrimination on March 8, was threatened on March 9, and terminated on March 10
